title: BTst Function
parameters:
number	Specifies the numer for the bit test with an expression or numeric value.

bitNum	Specifies the bit (integer from 0 to 31) to be tested.
description:
BTst Function

BTst Function

See_Also Example

Returns the status of 1 bit in a number.
see_also:
BClr

BClr64

BSet

BSet64

BTst64

BTst Function Example

If BTst(flags, 1) Then

  Print "Bit 1 is set"

EndIf
examples:
If BTst(flags, 1) Then Print "Bit 1 is set"
EndIf
